query: SELECT tu.name as turmaNome, t.name as trilhaNome, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status, COUNT(*) as qtdAlunos FROM assessment_pdi ap LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id LEFT JOIN turmas tu ON ap.turmaId = tu.id GROUP BY tu.name, t.name, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status ORDER BY tu.name, ap.macroInicio;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT tu.name as turmaNome, t.name as trilhaNome, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status, COUNT(*) as qtdAlunos FROM assessment_pdi ap LEFT JOIN trilhas t ON ap.trilhaId = t.id LEFT JOIN turmas tu ON ap.turmaId = tu.id GROUP BY tu.name, t.name, ap.macroInicio, ap.macroTermino, ap.status ORDER BY tu.name, ap.macroInicio;
